encounter.reason: Pandemic follow-up; worsening depressive episode; quetiapine added for insomnia and mood stabilization
encounter.location: Portland Behavioral Health Associates, 1520 NW 18th Ave, Suite 304, Portland, OR 97209

conditions.name: bipolar II disorder, current episode depressed, moderate to severe
conditions.note: Current depressive episode worsening over prior 4-6 weeks, exacerbated by pandemic-related psychosocial stressors. PHQ-9 worsened to 16. Passive suicidal ideation without plan or intent. Quetiapine added as adjunct treatment.

medications.name: quetiapine 50 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: Take 50 mg by mouth at bedtime
medications.reason: insomnia and mood stabilization as adjunct to lamotrigine for bipolar II depressive episode

medications.name: lamotrigine 200 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: Take 200 mg by mouth once daily
medications.reason: mood stabilizer for bipolar II disorder

document_references.description: Documents the 40-minute telemedicine follow-up for worsening bipolar II depressive episode during COVID-19 pandemic. Covers subjective report of insomnia, social isolation, passive suicidal ideation without plan/intent, mental status exam findings, PHQ-9 and GAD-7 scores, assessment of bipolar II depressive episode and insomnia, initiation of quetiapine 50 mg at bedtime, continuation of lamotrigine 200 mg, safety plan review, and lab orders for next in-person visit.

diagnostic_reports.description: Lamotrigine serum level ordered for next in-person visit to monitor therapeutic drug level.
Fasting glucose ordered for next in-person visit as baseline metabolic monitoring for quetiapine initiation.
Lipid panel ordered for next in-person visit as baseline metabolic monitoring for quetiapine initiation.
